items.title: Breaking change: constructEvent removed in v8

labels.name: breaking-change
labels.description: Marks issues tracking breaking API changes

items.body:
After upgrading to stripe v8.0.0, `stripe.webhooks.constructEvent()` is no longer available. The library throws `TypeError: stripe.webhooks.constructEvent is not a function`.

```js
// This no longer works in v8
const event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(req.rawBody, sig, webhookSecret);
```

According to the release notes, this was renamed to `stripe.webhooks.verify()`, but the new method is async and the migration guide is unclear on the expected shape of the return value.

Can someone confirm the correct migration path?

**Environment:**
- stripe: 8.0.0
- node: 20.11.0

items.title: Migration guide for stripe v8 webhook verification
v8.0.0 webhooks.verify signature does not match
